seoTitle: How to Enter Medical Expenses in TurboTax
metaDescription: Learn how to accurately enter eligible medical expenses in TurboTax to help lower your taxable income and maximize your deductions this tax year.
intro: Medical expenses can add up to a meaningful deduction if you track and enter them correctly in TurboTax. This guide walks through navigating to the right section of the interface and inputting your eligible costs accurately. It's especially useful for freelancers and small business owners who need to keep close records of health-related spending for maximum savings.

steps.heading: Navigate the TurboTax interface
steps.body: Find the medical expenses section within your TurboTax return where deductible costs are entered.

steps.heading: Enter your medical expenses step by step
steps.body: Input your eligible medical costs accurately, following TurboTax's prompts for each category of expense.

steps.heading: Understand medical expense deductions
steps.body: Medical expenses can reduce your taxable income when they qualify, so it helps to understand what counts before entering figures.

steps.heading: Keep accurate records for future filings
steps.body: Maintain organized documentation of your medical expenses throughout the year to make next year's entry process smoother.

faq.question: What medical expenses qualify for a deduction in TurboTax?
faq.answer: Eligible expenses generally include health-related costs that meet IRS deduction criteria; TurboTax will guide you through what qualifies as you enter your information.

faq.question: Is there a minimum threshold before medical expenses count?
faq.answer: The IRS typically requires medical expenses to exceed a percentage of your adjusted gross income before they're deductible, so check current IRS guidelines for the exact threshold.

faq.question: Do freelancers track medical expenses differently than employees?
faq.answer: Freelancers and small business owners often need to track health-related expenses more meticulously since they may not have employer-provided coverage offsetting costs.

faq.question: Can TurboTax help me avoid missing eligible expenses?
faq.answer: TurboTax's guided entry process and automation features are designed to help you accurately capture eligible expenses as you go through the medical expenses section.
